title: 求使用 AI 从 0 到 1 开发一个完整 web 前后端项目的成功经验
content: A developer describes an unsuccessful attempt to build a complete web application using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor). Their workflow involved creating PRD, plan, and frontend design documents sequentially, then implementing code. Despite extensive documentation, the result was merely a skeleton framework. The main pain point is maintenance: understanding AI-generated code for modifications requires deep engagement, creating tension between control and "vibe coding." They seek proven methodologies, tools, and workflow adjustments from experienced practitioners for AI-assisted full-stack development.

title: IF 27.5！这种常用补充剂，竟可大幅增加老年痴呆风险？加速大脑衰老，死亡风险高出 25%！ | 原文
content: A study with an impact factor of 27.5 found that a commonly used supplement significantly increases Alzheimer's disease risk, accelerates brain aging, and raises mortality risk by 25%. China has nearly 17 million dementia cases, exceeding the global average. Other research links adverse childhood experiences to later cognitive decline, with gender differences in how these effects manifest across cognitive states.

content: China's National Audit Office reported violations by seven major financial institutions. Key findings include: Bank of China evaded 239.7 million yuan in taxes by disguising private funds as public funds; Agricultural Bank improperly issued 11.07 billion yuan in agricultural loans, with funds diverted to wealth management products; banks inflated deposit and loan volumes by 1.41 trillion yuan through cutthroat competition; 194 of 970 "tech-focused" branches lacked actual technology specialization; and institutions improperly concealed or disposed of 63.4 billion yuan in bad assets.

content: Recent studies suggest GLP-1 weight-loss drugs like semaglutide and tirzepatide may offer an unexpected benefit for obese men: increased testosterone levels by approximately 30% and improved sperm quality. Obesity often disrupts male hormonal balance, causing low testosterone and fertility issues. While traditional testosterone replacement therapy can actually reduce fertility, these medications appear to address both weight loss and hormonal restoration simultaneously. The expanding therapeutic potential of GLP-1 drugs is projected to drive annual sales toward $70 billion.

title: 奥特曼私人提款机曝光，OpenAI埋6650亿暗雷
content: WSJ and The Information exposed OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's hidden financial empire despite his zero-equity claims. Confidential IPO filings reveal $665 trillion in off-balance-sheet commitments for chips, energy, and data centers. Altman orchestrated a self-enrichment loop: 45% of Q1 expenses flowed to related parties, including Microsoft; 72% of revenue costs paid to investor-suppliers; and $488 million in stock swapped for compute. His personal investments in Cerebras, Retro Biosciences, and Helion surged in value after OpenAI partnerships. A $4.1 billion Helion stake exemplifies conflicts of interest. The House Oversight Committee and state attorneys general have opened investigations, demanding SEC scrutiny before IPO.

title: What Happens to Design After AI?
content: John Maeda and Paul Bakaus discuss how AI is transforming design practice, exploring whether automation elevates baseline capabilities or expands creative possibilities. They examine software craftsmanship, taste, and creative judgment, noting that some design aspects will become automated while others gain value. The conversation covers agentic workflows, evolving user experience, designers' roles in AI-native environments, and how new tools will reshape relationships between designers, engineers, and software.

title: 物理 SIM 卡方便换机、没法快速换卡， eSIM 可以方便机内切换 SIM 卡、但容易被运营商设限甚至禁止转移，有没有突破这种限制的可能性？
content: eSIM transfer restrictions are widespread, affecting not just regional carriers but also travel providers like RedteaGO and Holafly, which prohibit moving activated eSIMs to new devices. These limitations stem from GSMA TS 43 standards requiring carrier authorization servers to process all eSIM provisioning and transfers, giving operators full control over transfer policies. While this architecture prevents unauthorized SIM swap attacks, it creates inconvenience for users who switch phones mid-subscription, especially with longer-term plans. No third-party tools currently bypass these authorization servers. A potential security enhancement could involve NFC-based physical verification between devices during transfer, though this remains speculative.

title: 刚刚，豆包宣布收费
content: ByteDance's AI app Doubao launched a paid Pro version on June 24, featuring tiered subscriptions at ¥68, ¥200, and ¥500 per month. The Pro version runs on the Doubao 2.1 Pro model and offers an "Office Task" mode with local computer control, browser automation, skills integration, and scheduled tasks. Free users access a limited version with the 2.1 Turbo model. The Pro model matches or exceeds competitors like Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5 in coding and agent benchmarks. Student discounts and accessibility pricing are available. This move targets monetization for Doubao's 336 million monthly users amid high operational costs.

title: GLM-5.2 和 GPT-5.5 架构文档对比
content: Claude Opus 4.8 evaluated architecture documents generated by GLM-5.2 and GPT-5.5. GLM-5.2 scored 9.3/10, excelling in completeness, depth, organization, usability, maintainability, and professionalism, with comprehensive coverage across four dimensions, nine documents, five ADRs, role-based reading paths, and industry best practices. GPT-5.5 scored 5.7/10, falling short in depth, missing risk assessments and evolution plans, lacking cross-references and maintenance protocols, and offering only a single linear reading path without role-specific guidance.

title: 今天，Claude入职了
content: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, integrating Claude as an "AI colleague" directly into Slack via @ mentions. It autonomously handles tasks—reading code, fixing bugs, running tests, submitting PRs—without switching contexts. Powered by Claude Opus 4.8, it maintains shared identity and memory across channels and tools. Currently in beta for Team and Enterprise users, built into Claude Cowork at no extra cost. Anthropic reports 65% of its own product team code now comes from internal Claude Tag. Andrej Karpathy called this the third paradigm shift in LLM interfaces, marking AI's transition from isolated tool to embedded teammate alongside OpenAI and Google's competing agent strategies.

title: 山西挖眼案受害男孩高考 721 分，全国同专业第一，盲人高考难度有多大？他身上有哪些精神让你感动？
content: Guo Bin, blinded at age six in the 2013 Shanxi eye-gouging attack, scored 721 out of 800 on China's special education college entrance exam, ranking first nationally for his major. He will pursue dual degrees in computer science and traditional Chinese medicine at Changzhou University. After relocating to Wuhan for schooling, he developed musical talent as a bassist while overcoming extreme academic challenges through Braille and relentless practice. Guo hopes to return to teach at his alma mater, the Wuhan School for Blind Children, to support other visually impaired students.

content: At 41, Cristiano Ronaldo maintains a biological age of 28.9 with 7% body fat, comparable to elite athletes in their prime. His regimen includes a strict diet of chicken, fish, and vegetables; no sugar, soda, or alcohol; segmented sleep for recovery; and rigorous daily training. His longevity stems from this discipline plus likely genetic factors. Experts note such extreme restriction risks nutrient deficiencies, disordered eating, and psychological strain for ordinary people lacking professional monitoring and athletic purpose. Portugal defeated Uzbekistan 5-0 in the World Cup as Ronaldo scored twice, becoming the oldest player with a World Cup brace.

title: 500元一个月的豆包专业版正式来了，到底贵不贵？实测后我们发现了真相
content:
Doubao launched three paid tiers on June 24: Standard (68 yuan/month), Enhanced (200 yuan/month), and Professional (500 yuan/month), all powered by the upgraded Doubao 2.1 model. Pricing is lower than ChatGPT and mid-range versus domestic competitors like Kimi.

The move addresses unsustainable compute costs: Doubao has 345 million monthly active users consuming millions of yuan in daily computing resources, while generating under 1 million yuan in daily revenue. ByteDance raised its 2026 AI capital expenditure to over 200 billion yuan. The Professional tier targets high-productivity scenarios like coding, agent-driven tasks, and document creation with Feishu integration, while free tier basic functions remain unchanged. ByteDance is prioritizing validating professional features over pursuing paid user penetration.

title: 刚刚，Claude Code大升级，卡帕西：LLM第三次变革
content: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, an enterprise collaboration tool integrating Claude into Slack as a shared, proactive AI team member. Unlike personal AI assistants, it offers shared context, persistent memory, proactive intervention via Ambient Mode, and asynchronous task execution across hours or days. The system accumulates organizational knowledge, handles tasks like code merges and data analysis, and connects to tools such as GitHub and Jira. Currently in beta for Enterprise and Team users, it requires Opus 4.8 and features strict privacy controls. Former OpenAI researcher Andrej Karpathy called it the third major shift in LLM interfaces, following web chat and desktop apps.

title: 微信AI全网最细体验，我又爱上了刷朋友圈
content:
WeChat has launched "Xiaowei," its first native AI assistant, with unprecedented prominence—a green eyes icon on the home screen and a dedicated page replacing the former right-swipe "starred" section. This marks WeChat's largest update in years, effectively creating a near-top-level entry point.

Xiaowei runs on WeChat's self-developed WeLM model, supplemented by DeepSeek for some responses. It integrates deeply across the ecosystem: users can send messages, make calls, summarize group chats, search Moments (friend posts), query payment records, call mini-programs for services like ordering or appointments, and generate simple tools via natural language prompts.

The AI leverages WeChat's unique data—personal chats, social connections, payment history, and content consumption—to deliver highly personalized responses, such as gift recommendations based on conversation history or shopping links from friend posts. All sensitive actions require user confirmation.

title: I automated my job (and it made me a better leader)
content: A senior director at GitHub describes building ~40 automations using the GitHub Copilot app to manage fragmented leadership work. The automations handle meeting preparation, daily triage, launch tracking, follow-up reminders, stale work alerts, and personal career documentation. As someone with AuDHD, she frames these tools primarily as accessibility aids that compensate for inconsistent executive function, making her leadership more reliable. She emphasizes that automations handle logistical scaffolding while she retains human connection work. She recommends starting with one high-friction area and refining through conversation with the agent.
